reason: Required upstream signal sources for SOLUSDT are not available; per issue scope rule 'If any input file is missing, REPORT blocker + STOP. Do NOT fabricate signals.'

perp_1m directory contains only BTCUSDT_1m.{parquet,csv} and ETHUSDT_1m.{parquet,csv}; AGENTS.md documents 'SOLUSDT_1m is intentionally absent'
